visual.name: spcControlChart
visual.description: SPC control charts: individuals (X-mR), attribute charts (p, np, c, u), and subgroup charts (X̄-R, X̄-s), with Western Electric / Nelson rules, automatic changepoint detection, a dispersion companion panel, target & annotation overlays, an on-chart rule reference, tooltips, cross-filtering, and report-theme / high-contrast support.
